title: Course spine
description: Canonical structure for course/spine.yaml (or spine.json). Supports shorter chapter-only courses and longer module-aware courses. Mirrors project-root CONTENTS.md.

course_id.description: Stable slug for the course (folder names, tooling).

audience_level.description: Target level, e.g. beginner, intermediate, advanced.

delivery.description: Optional planning metadata for adaptive generation and batching.

default_batch_size.description: Typical number of chapters or lessons generated at a time.

assessment_checkpoints.description: Whether the course expects reassessment checkpoints beyond the initial intake.

chapters.description: Linear chapter list for shorter courses where modules would add unnecessary structure.

modules.description: Module-aware course structure for longer courses. Use modules only when there are at least three meaningful module groupings.

lessonRef.description: Cross-chapter dependency: chapter dir + '/' + lesson id.

title.description: Module title; must match CONTENTS.md heading after '## {id}: '.

summary.description: Broad concept area covered by this module.

title.description: Chapter title; must match CONTENTS.md heading after '### {dir}: '.

summary.description: Optional narrow concept summary for the chapter.

lessons.description: Lessons in this chapter; ids are stems for Ch#/L# files.

id.description: Lesson file stem inside chapter dir: L1, L2, ...

title.description: Lesson title; must match numbered line in CONTENTS.md for this chapter.

kind.description: Optional lesson mode for adaptive flows and review checkpoints.

concept.description: One concise concept taught or checked by this lesson.

project_step.description: One real project advance tied to this lesson.

assessment_goal.description: Required when the lesson is a quiz or assessment.

reads.description: Optional paths or URLs for assigned reading.

tasks_summary.description: Short task or review bullets for agents and learners.

test_glob.description: Glob or single path resolving to this lesson's tests only. Canonical Python flow uses append-only main_test files; legacy per-lesson files like Ch1/L1.py remain migration-compatible.

lesson_selector.description: Pytest marker selector for this lesson when test_glob points at main_test.py or a split main_test_ch*.py file.

depends_on.description: Prior lessons (Ch#/L# refs). Empty for the course's first lesson(s).

hints.description: If true, Ch#/L#-hint.md must exist beside Ch#/L#.md.
